title: An Act to Address Climate Change
last_house_action: 5/14/2025 - Representative GRAMLICH from the Committee on ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES Reporting that the Bill be REFERRED to the Committee on ENERGY, UTILITIES AND TECHNOLOGY . Report was READ and ACCEPTED . The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on ENERGY, UTILITIES AND TECHNOLOGY Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/27/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
